title: Add cap-add and cap-drop to build man page
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add --cap-add and --cap-drop to build man page.  This was recently added in https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/799.  Also --userns-uid-map/--userns-gid-map had some changes in the Buildah man page, these have been added from https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/803

comments.body: Varlink generation errors trying to build the tests, looks like?

Do a 
git checkout vendor/github.com/varlink
Then 
git commit --amend -a -s

:pushpin: Commit a9a8696 has been approved by `mheon`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=mheon a9a8696b06d3ab33084252737c8dbb631fa5dfe0 -->

Another change has been made to the buildah bud man pages, just rewording/reformatting for --userns-uid-map/--userns-gid-map.  I've added those, bumped the Buildah version in vendor.conf again and have my fingers crossed that testing will finally pass.
@mheon, bot seems to be ignoring me, could you kick it please?

Tests are green, let's give this another go
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit c45c499 has been approved by `mheon`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=mheon c45c499725a4d9400ba61d2af7c4105b8ac1d9b8 -->

Approved by: mheon
